# Graceful International (HK) Limited — llms-full.txt

> Comprehensive AI-readable site content for deep context understanding.
> Covers all pages, products, certifications, and capabilities.
> Last updated: 2026-07-09

================================================================================
COMPANY PROFILE
================================================================================

Graceful International (HK) Limited is a professional OEM/ODM manufacturer
specializing in feminine hygiene products and adult incontinence care. Founded
in 2018, the company operates a 400-mu (26.7-hectare) production base in
Weifang, Shandong Province, China — one of the largest hygiene product
manufacturing hubs in Asia.

The factory houses 14 fully automated production lines and employs 300 people,
including a dedicated quality control team of 30 specialists. Annual production
capacity exceeds 2 billion sanitary pads and 500 million adult diapers.

================================================================================
BRAND: YEZHIEMENG
================================================================================

"Ye Zhi Meng" translates to "Dream of Leaves" — evoking natural comfort and
gentle protection. The brand positions itself at the intersection of advanced
manufacturing technology and dermatological safety.

================================================================================
CERTIFICATIONS
================================================================================

1. ISO 9001:2015 — Quality Management Systems
   - Covers: design, production, quality control, and delivery
   - Audited annually by SGS / TUV

2. ISO 13485:2016 — Medical Devices Quality Management Systems
   - Required for medical-grade hygiene products
   - Covers adult diapers classified as Class I medical devices in the EU
   - Enables CE marking for European market entry

================================================================================
PRODUCT LINE 1: SANITARY PADS (女士卫生巾系列)
================================================================================

Product A: Ultra-Soft Cotton Sanitary Pads (亲肤棉卫生巾)
- Surface material: imported natural cotton (non-woven, dermatologically tested)
- Core: Japanese SAP (Super Absorbent Polymer) with 3D channel distribution
- Thickness options: 0.1cm ultra-thin, 0.2cm regular, 0.3cm maxi
- Sizes: 180mm (pantyliner), 240mm (day), 290mm (night), 350mm (overnight), 420mm (postpartum)
- Features: breathable PE backsheet, independent foil wrapping, wing/non-wing options
- Certifications: SGS dermatological test passed, FDA 510(k) exempt, EU CE
- Packaging: custom private label with client's brand design
- MOQ: 1x20ft container (approx. 500,000-800,000 pieces depending on size mix)

Product B: Probiotic Sanitary Pads (益生菌卫生巾)
- Surface: probiotic-infused top layer with Lactobacillus ferment
- Purpose: maintains healthy vaginal pH (3.8-4.5), inhibits odor-causing bacteria
- Clinical validation: third-party lab tested for bacterial inhibition rate >99%
- Added benefits: far-infrared anion chip for microcirculation
- Popular in: South Korea, Japan, European organic/natural markets
- Shelf life: 3 years (probiotic stability verified through accelerated aging tests)

================================================================================
PRODUCT LINE 2: ADULT DIAPERS (成人纸尿裤系列)
================================================================================

Product: Super-Absorbent Adult Diapers (速吸型成人纸尿裤)
- Types: tape-on briefs, pull-up pants, overnight maxi
- Absorbency levels: moderate (800ml), heavy (1500ml), maximum (2500ml+)
- Core technology: multi-layer SAP + fluff pulp with instant absorption channel
- Features: wetness indicator, odor lock, anti-leak leg cuffs, breathable backsheet
- Waist sizes: S (50-70cm) to XXL (120-160cm)
- Target users: elderly care facilities, hospitals, home care
- Certifications: ISO 13485, EU CE (Class I medical device), FDA
- MOQ: 1x20ft container (approx. 30,000-60,000 pieces depending on size)

================================================================================
FACTORY CAPABILITIES
================================================================================

Location: Weifang Hi-Tech Industrial Zone, Shandong, China
Total Area: 400 mu (266,000 sqm)
Built Area: 120,000 sqm

Production Zones:
- Workshop A: 4 lines — ultra-thin sanitary pads
- Workshop B: 3 lines — maxi/overnight pads
- Workshop C: 3 lines — adult diapers (tape-on)
- Workshop D: 4 lines — adult pull-ups + pantyliners

Supporting Facilities:
- Raw material warehouse: 20,000 sqm (climate-controlled)
- Finished goods warehouse: 30,000 sqm
- In-house microbiology lab: 500 sqm (BSL-2 standard)
- QC testing center: 800 sqm
- R&D center: 1,200 sqm with pilot production line
- Staff dormitory and canteen for 500 people

Production Speed:
- Sanitary pad line: up to 1,200 pieces/min per line
- Adult diaper line: up to 300 pieces/min per line

Quality Control Process (4-Step):
1. Raw Material Inspection — All incoming materials tested against 42 parameters
2. In-line Monitoring — Real-time weight, thickness, and seal integrity checks
3. Microbiological Testing — Random sampling every 2 hours per line
4. Finished Product Sampling — AQL 2.5 sampling per batch before shipment

================================================================================
OEM/ODM COOPERATION MODEL
================================================================================

Services offered:
1. OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturing): Use client's brand, our formula
2. ODM (Original Design Manufacturing): We design, client brands
3. Private Label: Full packaging design, marketing material support
4. Contract Manufacturing: Dedicated production line for large clients

Typical Timeline:
- Inquiry → Sample: 3-5 business days
- Sample approval → Production: 15-25 days (depending on order volume)
- Production → Shipment: FOB Qingdao/Shanghai

Sampling Policy:
- Free samples available for qualified buyers (courier cost covered by buyer)
- Custom samples with client's specs: small development fee, refundable against first order

================================================================================
EXPORT MARKETS
================================================================================

Primary: EU (Germany, Netherlands, France, Italy, Poland), USA, South Korea
Secondary: Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, South America
Annual export volume: confidential

Shipping: FOB Qingdao / FOB Shanghai / CIF available
Payment terms: T/T 30/70 (30% deposit, 70% before shipment), L/C at sight

================================================================================
KEY STATISTICS
================================================================================

- Founded: 2018
- Factory area: 400 mu (26.7 hectares / 66 acres)
- Production lines: 14 (fully automated)
- Annual sanitary pad capacity: 2 billion+ pieces
- Annual adult diaper capacity: 500 million+ pieces
- Total workforce: 300 employees
- QC team: 30 specialists
- In-house lab BSL-2: 500 sqm
- R&D center: 1,200 sqm
- Raw material warehouse: 20,000 sqm
- Finished goods warehouse: 30,000 sqm
- Quality control: 4-stage process, 42 raw material parameters
- Export reach: 20+ countries across Europe, Americas, Asia

================================================================================
INDUSTRY CONTEXT (From Knowledge Hub)
================================================================================

Global Feminine Hygiene Market:
- Market size (2024): ~$28 billion
- Projected (2030): ~$42 billion
- CAGR: ~7.2%

Global Adult Diaper Market:
- Market size (2024): ~$18 billion
- Projected (2030): ~$30 billion
- CAGR: ~8.8%
- Key drivers: aging population in Japan, Europe, USA; increasing acceptance in emerging markets

China's Role:
- China produces ~40% of global sanitary pads
- Shandong province is the largest hygiene product manufacturing cluster
- Manufacturing cost advantage: 30-50% vs. EU/US producers

Certification Requirements by Market:
- EU: CE marking (Class I medical device for adult diapers), REACH compliance
- USA: FDA registration, 510(k) premarket notification
- South Korea: KFDA certification
- Middle East: SASO, ESMA compliance

Website: https://www.gracehygi.com
